creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
OK, I've changed the instructions along the lines of what des@
suggested and added a warning about allowing root in the jail access
to the host as well.

New patches for the manpage [1] and Handbook [2].

Thanks!

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/jail-secure-manpage_1.diff
[2] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/jail-secure-handbook_1.diff
